title: Jira: Use JQL performance suggestions to optimize your company-managed board.
description:
See how you can improve your Jira board’s performance. Use JQL suggestions tailored for you. Go to your board: Select (…) More actions then Configure board.
	Go to Board filter.
	If your JQL is missing a top-level project term, you’ll see a JQL suggestion with the title Edit filter to improve performance.
	Select Edit filter query to review and save your filter with the suggested improvement.
